title: Full Reel 15mm Satin Edge Organza Ribbon, 25 Metres on Reel- Burgundy Dust
features: High quality ribbon on strong plastic spools

Usage: It is perfect for card making, clothing, crafts, decorations, Christmas and gift wrapping, florists, flowers and weddings, hairbows, hair bow clips, woven headbands, scrapbooking and many other projects.
Available in 4 sizes & 29 Colours at our store, please search the size as you like 10mm x 25M - 15mm x 25M - 25mm x 25M - 40mm x 25M
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to our Satin Edge Organza Ribbon By Super Ribbons Colour: We have 28 different colours available for you to choose from. You can select Yellow, Fluorescent Green, Mint, Forest Green, White, Cream, Sunflower Yellow, Golden Tan, Lavender, Lilac, Light Blue, Navy, Black, Dusty Pink, Wine, Hot Pink, Red, Burgundy Dust, Move Grey, Rust, Peach, Orange, Brown, Silver, Baby Blue, Baby Pink, Gold, Purple & Dark Blue. from the drop-down menu above. Our Satin Edge Organza Ribbon is premium quality. It is perfect for card making, clothing, crafts, decorations, gift wrapping, florists, flowers and weddings. All of our Satin Edge Organza Ribbon is supplied on good Quality Reels. Dimensions: Length: 25 Meters Width: 10mm 15mm 25mm 40mm About Super Ribbons Super Ribbons is a UK-based company providing high-quality ribbons in many different colours and widths. Quality Satin Edge Organza Ribbon high quality ribbon on strong plastic spools Perfect for any occasion whether it's a wedding, Christmas or even a birthday Our Fabric ribbon are made of 100% polyester, and the ribbon is smooth shiny and luxurious.
